legal_description.value: A portion of the Southwest Quarter of Section 23, Township 2 South, Range 6 East, Gila and Salt River Base and Meridian, Maricopa County, Arizona; containing 40.00 acres more or less. Same parent tract as described in recording 19780100001.

source_note.value: Demo-only instrument. Models the consolidation-to-developer step that preceded the 2001 Seville Parcel 3 plat. Gilbert's farmland was aggregated by land-banking LLCs throughout the mid-1990s in advance of the Phoenix-metro residential build-out; Williams-family sale to a small holding LLC matches that pattern. Seville Ventures LLC is a fabricated intermediary; no real entity of that name appears in the Maricopa recorder public API for this period.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only instrument reconstructing the Williams-heirs to developer-intermediary sale. No real instrument by this recording number exists in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
